Event: Royal Challenge - Season 4
Event Date: 01/08/2022
Sage Bot Item Code: A118
Cage of Dispair

Triggers: When battle starts

A random enemy unit can’t use artifact abilities for 5 sec. When this effect ends, artifact ability applies again to a random enemy unit. If there is only one unit left, the ability applies again.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
